response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, alongside direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — all core requirements of the role. His deep engineering background, open-source contributions, and cross-stack adaptability strongly align with the position’s demands, despite limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple roles
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong DevOps and testing culture with Docker, CI/CD, and open-source testing libraries
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited evidence of recent work with PostgreSQL/MySQL or Kubernetes in production
German language proficiency is basic, may hinder local collaboration
